finalAssistantMessages.text: The two product repos both point at core `1841f73`, and the hub pointer diff is only `mushroom-master` plus `meat-master`. Committing that hub pointer update now.
Hub pointer commit is pushed. I’m doing a final status sweep so the handoff is clear about what is ours and what was pre-existing/unrelated.

Implemented and pushed the asset-service extraction path. Done: - Moved Mushroom `asset-service.js` logic into core as quarantined `createMushroomAssetServicePort()`. - Left Mushroom with a thin wrapper injecting DB, wallet, portrait catalog, mutation-claim, clock/id/json/env providers. - Updated Meat to pin the same core SHA and smoke-test the new economy export. - Updated Mushroom extraction docs/roadmap to mark asset-service done and narrow the remaining server queue. - Updated hub pointers for both consumers. Commits pushed: - Core: `1841f73` `Move asset service port into core` - Mushroom: `d815af4` `Consume core asset service port`, plus `975f5f7` doc correction - Meat: `f11fcc7` `Updat
